caption:
There’s a refresh coming mid-week and then all-time conditions lining up for Easter weekend.  Where is it going to snow the most, where will the winds deposit fresh snow and what type of snow surface will it land on? Every guided trip with BlackSheep is a class on how we move through avalanche terrain and more importantly, they why in our decision making.

Join us this Easter weekend for a guided trip where we’ll teach you where the goods are hidden and how to find them every time!

Photo @summitsaga

#spring #skitour #backcountry #blacksheepadventure

春の白馬BCツアーに参加。今回は登って滑るだけではなく、ビーコン、プローブ、ショベルの正しい使い方を教えていただきました。冬山を楽しむ為には最低限のルールは守っておきたい。天気も快晴で白馬連山を眺めながらのツアーは最高でした。
ガイドをして頂いた @hakuba_op @akmorisnow 、
企画をしてくれたスプートニク菅沼さん @_sskkmmss 、
大変お世話になりました！

#白馬バックカントリー #backcountry #hakubabackcountry #snowbording

caption:
We really showed up for book club this month. Pizza, tulips, and cake. Always cake. 🌷

This month’s pick was The Last Letter by Rebecca Yarros and yes there were tears. You already know.

But more than anything I’m just really grateful for these girls. Truly spring in human form, every single one of them. 💐

#bookstagram #bookclubreads #thelastletter #rebeccayarros #bookishcommunity

#bookstagram #bookclubreads #thelastletter #rebeccayarros #bookishcommunity

my emotions be all over the damn place with the books I read 🙃

#thelastletter #powerlesstrilogy  #empyreanseries #boysoftommen #theravenhoodseries

The Last Letter by Rebecca Yarros 

♾️⭐️

All those videos you see of people getting absolutely WRECKED by this book are accurate. I barely survived the ending of this book and I am still NOT OKAY 😭 

This book was absolutely heartbreaking in every single way. But I loved how beautifully written it was. Ella deserved so much and my heart went out to her, she survived the unthinkable and kept on going. I loved seeing how Beckett came in and found his family with Ella and the kids. Maisie & Colt, oh my heart. Those kids were so special. I cried so many times during this book that I lost count, and absolutely nothing could have prepared me for the end. My heart is so broken, and I couldn’t have predicted what was going to happen. I’ll never be able to look at a Red Leaf the same again 💔

I think it’s safe to say that RY is becoming one of my favourite authors. I’m excited (and slightly scared lol) to read more of her books. 

Have you read this book? 📚

#bookstagram #thelastletter #bookreview #bookblogger #rebeccayarros

📚 𝑴𝒚 𝒍𝒂𝒔𝒕, 𝒄𝒖𝒓𝒓𝒆𝒏𝒕 & 𝒏𝒆𝒙𝒕 𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒅 📚

✨ Last: King of Wrath by @authoranahuang 
I really enjoyed this one 🤍 It was such a fun and addictive read, exactly what I needed at the time. The tension, the characters… it just kept me turning pages. I’ll be sharing a full review very soon 👀

✨ Current: Beautiful Ugly by @alicewriterland 
Okay but… I’m actually obsessed 😍 This book has completely pulled me in and I keep thinking about it when I’m not reading. I went in with pretty high expectations after reading My Husband’s Wife, and so far it’s living up to them (maybe even more??) 🙌🏽

✨ Next: The Last Letter by @rebeccayarros 
I’ve seen SO many emotional reviews about this book and I just know it’s going to break me… and I’m ready for it 😭📖 I honestly can’t wait to start it, but also feel like I need to emotionally prepare first🥺

QOTD: What’s your current and next read? 🤍✨

caption:
What was the last book that completely shattered your heart? 💔📖 

For me, it was The Last Letter. 
The kind that lingers long after the final page… 

And honestly… I’m still not over it 🥀 

#booktok #bookstagram #emotionalreads #heartbreakingbooks #thelastletter

✨ REBECCA YARROS - ALLES, WAS ICH GEBEN KANN ✨
BEENDET: 1000/5 ⭐️

Ich lüge nicht, wenn ich sage, dass das das beste Buch ist, das ich je gelesen habe! Nicht eine Minute während des Lesens hatte ich das Gefühl, dass etwas überflüssig ist oder die Story künstlich in die Länge zieht. Nicht eine Minute während des Hörens, wenn ich gerade nicht lesen konnte, hatte ich das Gefühl, mit den Gedanken abzuschweifen und nicht mehr beim Buch zu sein. Diese tiefe, absolut bewegende Geschichte um Ella, ihre Zwillinge und Beckett ist - in meinen Augen - unglaublich perfekt geschrieben. Ich hab sehr oft schon während der Geschichte Tränen in den Augen gehabt und konnte mich nur schwer zusammenreissen. Gerade als Mutter hat mich das Buch glaube ich nochmal anders mitgenommen 🥺 und in dem Moment, in dem man befürchtet, dass man das Ende kommen sieht … ne, siehst du nicht kommen. Ein Plot-Twist, der mich auseinander genommen hat - vor Tagen schon - und ich werde für lange Zeit nicht wieder zusammen gesetzt werden können 💔 also wirklich 10/10, 5/5 - nennt‘s, wie ihr wollt! Rebecca Yarros halt 🥹✨

Lest es 🙏🏼♥️ 

REBECCAYARROS
THELASTLETTER 
BOOKSTHATHEAL
DTVVERLAG
_

#rebeccayarros #thelastletter #alleswasichgebenkann #booksaremytherapy #bookishweekend
